name: dk-toolkit-skills
description: A comprehensive suite of Claude Code plugins for Shopify theme development, performance optimization, and dynamic content management.

plugins.name: Dynamic Data Flow
plugins.description: Converts hardcoded Shopify Liquid templates into fully dynamic, metafield-driven pages.

plugins.name: Shopify Build Page
plugins.description: Build complete Shopify theme pages from Figma designs by splitting into sections and wiring into template JSON.

plugins.name: Shopify Section Generator
plugins.description: Generate one Shopify theme section (schema + Liquid + CSS + JS) from mobile+desktop Figma nodes.

plugins.name: JavaScript Standards
plugins.description: Vanilla JavaScript standards for Shopify themes — modern ES syntax, Web Components, event delegation, AJAX cart, pub/sub, accessibility, and strict rules.

plugins.name: Shopify Performance Audit
plugins.description: Generate professional .docx performance audit reports for Shopify websites using PageSpeed Insights.

plugins.name: CLS Improvement
plugins.description: Detect, analyze, plan, implement, and validate Cumulative Layout Shift improvements.

plugins.name: FCP Improvement
plugins.description: Detect, analyze, plan, implement, and validate First Contentful Paint improvements.

plugins.name: LCP Improvement
plugins.description: Detect, analyze, plan, implement, and validate Largest Contentful Paint improvements.

plugins.name: TBT Improvement
plugins.description: Detect, analyze, plan, implement, and validate Total Blocking Time improvements.

plugins.name: Visual QA
plugins.description: Automated Shopify theme visual QA across 11 breakpoints (320px-2560px).

plugins.name: Skill Updater
plugins.description: Auto-propagates learnings from LEARNINGS.md into skill files for continuous improvement.

categories.shopify-content: Content management and dynamic template tools
